import ssl
import urllib.request

_TLS_CONTEXT = ssl.create_default_context(cafile="/etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt")


def fetch_secure(url: str) -> str:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(url, context=_TLS_CONTEXT) as resp:
        return resp.read().decode()


def fetch_user_data(user_id: str) -> str:
    url = f"https://api.example.com/users/{user_id}"
    with urllib.request.urlopen(url, context=_TLS_CONTEXT) as resp:
        return resp.read().decode()


def batch_fetch(urls: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    results = []
    for url in urls:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(url, context=_TLS_CONTEXT) as resp:
            results.append(resp.read().decode())
    return results
